name: field-slider
visual_summary: field-slider is a versatile UI component that allows users to select a value from a range of options. It's commonly used in cases where a precise numerical value needs to be input, such as configuring image brightness or text font size. The component features a slider bar and numerical input field, enabling users to seamlessly switch between manual input and dragging the slider.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics:

Name: field-slider
Description: field-slider is a versatile UI component that allows users to select a value from a range of options. It's commonly used in cases where a precise numerical value needs to be input, such as configuring image brightness or text font size. The component features a slider bar and numerical input field, enabling users to seamlessly switch between manual input and dragging the slider.
Style: e.g. modern, compact
Interactions: e.g. draggable, fillable
Tags: input, range, configurable

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
